description: [TFO]Far Seer weak-farm pure-infantry calibration, 2026-07-03 12:32-12:36 (WOS_BattleReports_FarSeerCalibration.pdf, 8 battles, one page). NO heroes, NO proc skills on either side (low-tier troops both sides; T7 infantry passive = flat anti-lancer advantage only). All battles vs Lv12 Musk Ox. All DEFEATS with own side wiped; beast losses come from the FRONT INFANTRY GROUP ONLY (no lancers -> no bypass; front never broken).

beast.name: Lv12 Musk Ox
beast.unit_level_check: power/unit = 9.0 EXACT = tier 4 power; bonus +14.4% slots between Lv10 +8.5% and Lv13 +18.5%

battles.note: Martin said tiers 7 and 2 only, but power arithmetic (2 injured x 3 = 6) says TIER 1 - confirm badge

identities_verified: ALL 8 battles: own power loss == injured x attacker tier power (also identifies tiers unambiguously: 28=T7, 4=T2, 3=T1); beast power loss == kills x 9.0 exactly.
key_findings: ENGINE IS DETERMINISTIC WITHOUT PROC SKILLS: three identical T7 N=1000 runs -> beast losses 252/252/252, injured 2/2/2, powers identical to the unit. ALL previously measured variance (10-16% sd) comes from proc-skill RNG. Proc-free configs need only ONE run per data point.

N-ladder (T7: 900/1000/1100/1200 -> 214/252/291/332): kills ~ N^1.525. With survival-time factor ~N^1 (own wipe duration proportional to N), per-event exponent e = 0.525 - EXACTLY the static-fit value from the 8 PvP reports. Two independent derivations agree to 3 decimals.
Tier ladder at N=1000: T1 11 / T2 26 / T7 252 kills - clean kernel-shape constraints (attacker A*L and own D*H both vary with known values; beast fixed).
Severe (injured) share ~0.2-0.3% of incapacitated - beast bookkeeping again; lightly injured cost ZERO power (own power loss counts injured only).
Front-group-only damage; beast lancer/marks groups untouched (no bypass without lancers).
